problem_text_cn:
3-32 各边长为$l$的匀质立方体大木块，如图3-35所示，对半切成两块，将上表面为$AB_1C_1D_1$斜平面的一块留下放在水平面上，其质量为$2m$，沿$AB_1$，$B_1C_1$，$AB_2$，$B_2C_2$设置四根斜直细管道，质量均为$m$的两个小球同时从A端静止释放，分别沿$AB_1$，$B_1C_1$管道滑下，它们在$B_1$，$B_2$处可光滑迅速地拐弯。
(1) 设木块固定在水平面上，管道平直部分与各小球之间的摩擦因数为$\mu$，试问$\mu$为何值，小球才能滑下？并计算小球到达C处时的速度。
(2) 设木块与水平面光滑接触，管道内处处无摩擦，试求小球到达C处时相对地面的速度大小。
problem_text_en:
3-32 A uniform cube of side length $l$ is cut in half as shown in Figure 3-35. The half with the slanted upper surface $AB_1C_1D_1$ is placed on a horizontal plane; its mass is $2m$. Four straight thin pipes are laid along $AB_1$, $B_1C_1$, $AB_2$, $B_2C_2$. Two balls, each of mass $m$, are released simultaneously from rest at end A and slide down pipes $AB_1$, $B_1C_1$ respectively; they can turn smoothly and rapidly at points $B_1$, $B_2$.
(1) Assume the block is fixed on the horizontal plane, and the coefficient of friction between the straight pipe sections and each ball is $\mu$. For what value of $\mu$ can the balls slide down? Also calculate the velocity of the ball when it reaches point C.
(2) Assume the block contacts the horizontal plane smoothly (no friction), and there is no friction inside the pipes. Determine the speed of the ball relative to the ground when it reaches point C.
problem_solution_cn:
解 参考图3-36中的几何参量，有
$$ \sin \alpha=\frac{\sqrt{2}}{3},\quad \cos \alpha=\frac{1}{\sqrt{3}}, $$
$$ \sin \beta=\frac{\sqrt{2}}{\sqrt{5}},\quad \cos \beta=\frac{\sqrt{3}}{\sqrt{5}}. $$
小球沿$AB_1$方向运动时，$g$可分解为图示$g_{\parallel}$，$g_{\perp}$，其中
$$ g_{\parallel}=g\cos\alpha\cos\beta=\frac{1}{\sqrt{5}}g, $$
$g_{\perp1}$与$g_{\perp2}$合成与小球运动方向垂直的$g_{\perp}$（图中未画出），必有
$$ g_{\perp1}=\sqrt{g_{\perp}^{2}-g_{\parallel}^{2}}=\frac{2}{\sqrt{5}}g. $$
小球沿$AB_1$运动时，加速度为
$$ a=g_{\parallel}-\mu g_{\perp1}=(1-2\mu)\frac{1}{\sqrt{5}}g, $$
为使小球能下滑，要求$a>0$，即$\mu$的取值范围为
$$ \mu<\frac{1}{2}. $$
小球沿$B_1C$管道运动时，下滑加速度仍为上述$a$值。小球所经总路程为
$$ s=2\times\frac{\sqrt{5}}{2}l=\sqrt{5}l, $$
到达C处时速度大小为
$$ v=\sqrt{2as}=\sqrt{2(1-2\mu)gl}. $$
(2) 木块与水平面光滑接触时，木块会沿图中$CA'$方向运动，速度记为$u$。因对称性，小球无论沿哪一个管道运动，相对于木块的速度可同记为$v'$，参考图3-36中的$\alpha$和$\beta$角，$v'$可分解为沿$A'C$方向的分量$v_{AC}'$和垂直于$A'C$方向的分量$v_{\perp}'$，大小各为
$$ v_{AC}'=v'\cos\beta\sin\alpha=\frac{\sqrt{2}}{\sqrt{5}}v',\quad v_{\perp}'=\frac{\sqrt{3}}{\sqrt{5}}v'. $$
小球相对地面速度$v$也可分解为沿$A'C$方向的分量$v_{AC}$和垂直于$A'C$方向的分量$v_{\perp}$，大小各为
$$ v_{AC}=v_{AC}'-u=\frac{\sqrt{2}}{\sqrt{5}}v'-u,\quad v_{\perp}=v_{\perp}'=\frac{\sqrt{3}}{\sqrt{5}}v'. $$
$A'C$方向动量守恒式为
$$ 2mv_{AC}=2mu, $$
得
$$ v'=\sqrt{10}u,\quad v_{AC}=u,\quad v_{\perp}=\sqrt{6}u, $$
$$ v^{2}=v_{AC}^{2}+v_{\perp}^{2}=7u^{2}. $$
两小球到达C点时，由机械能守恒式
$$ 2\times\frac{1}{2}mv^{2}+\frac{1}{2}(2m)u^{2}=2mgl, $$
可解得小球到C处时，相对地面的速度大小为
$$ v=\frac{\sqrt{7}}{2}\sqrt{gl}. $$
problem_solution_en:
Solution Referring to the geometric parameters in Figure 3-36, we have
$$ \sin \alpha=\frac{\sqrt{2}}{3},\quad \cos \alpha=\frac{1}{\sqrt{3}}, $$
$$ \sin \beta=\frac{\sqrt{2}}{\sqrt{5}},\quad \cos \beta=\frac{\sqrt{3}}{\sqrt{5}}. $$
When the ball moves along $AB_1$, $g$ can be decomposed into $g_{\parallel}$ and $g_{\perp}$ as shown. Among them,
$$ g_{\parallel}=g\cos\alpha\cos\beta=\frac{1}{\sqrt{5}}g, $$
$g_{\perp1}$ and $g_{\perp2}$ combine to form $g_{\perp}$ perpendicular to the ball’s motion (not drawn), and necessarily
$$ g_{\perp1}=\sqrt{g_{\perp}^{2}-g_{\parallel}^{2}}=\frac{2}{\sqrt{5}}g. $$
The acceleration of the ball along $AB_1$ is
$$ a=g_{\parallel}-\mu g_{\perp1}=(1-2\mu)\frac{1}{\sqrt{5}}g. $$
For the ball to slide down, we require $a>0$, i.e. the range of $\mu$ is
$$ \mu<\frac{1}{2}. $$
When the ball moves along $B_1C$, the down‑slope acceleration remains the same $a$. The total distance travelled is
$$ s=2\times\frac{\sqrt{5}}{2}l=\sqrt{5}l, $$
and the speed upon reaching C is
$$ v=\sqrt{2as}=\sqrt{2(1-2\mu)gl}. $$
(2) When the block contacts the horizontal plane smoothly, it will move along the $CA'$ direction; denote its speed as $u$. By symmetry, the speed of either ball relative to the block can be written as $v'$. Referring to angles $\alpha$ and $\beta$ in Figure 3-36, $v'$ can be decomposed into the component along $A'C$, $v_{AC}'$, and the perpendicular component $v_{\perp}'$, of magnitudes
$$ v_{AC}'=v'\cos\beta\sin\alpha=\frac{\sqrt{2}}{\sqrt{5}}v',\quad v_{\perp}'=\frac{\sqrt{3}}{\sqrt{5}}v'. $$
The ball’s velocity relative to the ground, $v$, can also be decomposed into components along $A'C$, $v_{AC}$, and perpendicular to $A'C$, $v_{\perp}$, with magnitudes
$$ v_{AC}=v_{AC}'-u=\frac{\sqrt{2}}{\sqrt{5}}v'-u,\quad v_{\perp}=v_{\perp}'=\frac{\sqrt{3}}{\sqrt{5}}v'. $$
Momentum conservation in the $A'C$ direction gives
$$ 2mv_{AC}=2mu, $$
from which
$$ v'=\sqrt{10}u,\quad v_{AC}=u,\quad v_{\perp}=\sqrt{6}u, $$
$$ v^{2}=v_{AC}^{2}+v_{\perp}^{2}=7u^{2}. $$
When both balls reach point C, mechanical energy conservation yields
$$ 2\times\frac{1}{2}mv^{2}+\frac{1}{2}(2m)u^{2}=2mgl, $$
and solving gives the speed of the ball relative to the ground at C as
$$ v=\frac{\sqrt{7}}{2}\sqrt{gl}. $$
img_cn: 图3-35展示了被切成一半的立方体木块，其斜面$AB_1C_1D_1$放置在水平面上，质量为$2m$。图中标出了四根斜直细管道$AB_1$、$B_1C_1$、$AB_2$、$B_2C_2$，以及从A端释放的两个质量均为$m$的小球。图示清晰呈现了立方体的几何结构、管道布置及小球初始位置。
图3-36是用于分析几何关系的辅助示意图。图中显示了与小球运动相关的角度$\alpha$和$\beta$，并标注了重力加速度$g$沿管道方向和平行方向的分量$g_\parallel$、$g_\perp$等几何量，为解题提供几何依据。
img_en: Figure 3-35 shows the half‑cube block with its slanted surface $AB_1C_1D_1$ placed on a horizontal plane, mass $2m$. The figure indicates the four straight thin pipes $AB_1$, $B_1C_1$, $AB_2$, $B_2C_2$, and two balls of mass $m$ each released from end A. The illustration clearly presents the geometry of the cube, the arrangement of the pipes, and the initial positions of the balls.

Figure 3-36 is an auxiliary schematic for analyzing geometric relationships. It shows the angles $\alpha$ and $\beta$ relevant to the ball’s motion, and labels geometric quantities such as the components of gravitational acceleration $g$ along and perpendicular to the pipe direction, $g_\parallel$, $g_\perp$, etc., providing the geometric basis for the solution.
problem_answer:
(1) 小球能滑下的条件为$\mu<\dfrac{1}{2}$，到达C处时的速度$v=\sqrt{2(1-2\mu)gl}$。
(2) 小球到达C处时相对地面的速度大小为$v=\dfrac{\sqrt{7}}{2}\sqrt{gl}$。
